name: Black Worker Ant
description: A sturdier black worker ant that appears around the veggie garden and the war-torn anthill. It is not as flashy as a soldier, but it punishes carelessness far better than the earlier ants if you underestimate it.
behavior: It patrols anthill and garden routes, usually with other black ants nearby. Its threat does not come from complex movement, but from how reliably it joins any fight that starts in its area.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral as long as you do not provoke it or push too deeply into the nest. Once the fight starts, it commits quickly and reminds you that the real danger is almost never just one black ant.
interactionWithCreatures: It leans heavily on nearby black ants and chains into combat whenever one of its allies spots a threat. That coordination is exactly what makes a simple encounter escalate so quickly.
strategy: Spicy and stabbing weapons are still the cleanest answer. Even then, the bigger issue is not raw damage so much as preventing multiple black ants from surrounding you or cutting off your retreat.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick direct bite with consistent damage.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It pauses briefly before unleashing a stronger hit.
